info.title: Documentación de inventario API
info.description: Documentación de API utilizado para manejo de inventario

post.summary: Get token by username and password
post.description: Get an authorization token by username and password

post.summary: Update user password by token and email

200.describe: Get bill detail by billId success

get.description: Get all categories, optionally filter only enabled

200.description: Get a price by productId success

202.description: Update a price by id success

get.description: Get all products with page and limit, optionally filtered by categories

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: How many items will be return

parameters.name: categories
parameters.description: Comma-separated category IDs to filter by (AND logic)

post.description: Create a product and price with optional image

put.description: Update a product by id with optional image

get.description: Get all stocks with pagination, optionally filtered by warehouse

post.description: Create a new stock entry for a product in a warehouse

get.description: Get a stock entry by its ID
Get stock entry for a specific product

patch.description: Remove quantity from stock (cannot go below 0)

get.summary: Get movements for a specific product
Get movements for a product in a specific warehouse

get.description: Get all suppliers, optionally filter only enabled

post.description: Transfer stock from one warehouse to another

get.summary: Get stock by product across all warehouses
get.description: Get all stock entries for a product across all warehouses
Returns a list of all users with their roles

patch.description: Update the role of a specific user

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: How many items will be returned

delete.description: Soft delete a warehouse by id

transferToWarehouseId.description: For transfer movements (source warehouse), the destination warehouse

transferFromWarehouseId.description: For transfer movements (destination warehouse), the source warehouse

BearerAuth.description: Enter your bearer token in the format **Bearer <token>**
